name: Snow Peas with Mushrooms Joan H.
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the wok and add the sesame oil.
2. When the oil begins to smoke, add snow peas and mushrooms.
3. Stir fry for 2 minutes.
4. Add seasonings (sherry, sugar, and soy sauce).
5. Continue stirring for another minute.
6. Serve immediately.
